description_long: This structure is a large wooden dam-like object with a curved, bowl-shaped interior reminiscent of a skateboarding half-pipe, featuring a smooth plywood surface and metal railings along the top edges for safety. The exterior walls are vertical and flat, with a rectangular opening on one side and a painted mural of a face. The interior base is decorated with a colorful graffiti-style artwork. On one end, a tall, narrow staircase with metal railings leads up to a platform that overlooks the main structure. The entire object is elevated on wooden supports, giving it a raised appearance. The construction is primarily wood, with visible grain patterns and a natural finish, complemented by metallic safety railings.
description: A large, wooden dam-like structure with a curved, bowl-shaped interior, metal railings, and a staircase leading to an elevated platform. The exterior features murals and the interior is decorated with graffiti art.
description_view_0: The front view shows the flat exterior wall with a rectangular opening and a mural of a face, as well as the top railings and the start of the staircase.
description_view_1: This view highlights the curved, bowl-shaped interior with graffiti art, the full extent of the metal railings, and the staircase leading up to the platform.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back wall with a rectangular opening, the elevated platform supported by tall wooden posts, and the continuation of the railings.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the interior bowl, the graffiti artwork, and the staircase/platform structure on the left side.
